name: Koko Crater Railway
tagline: 1,048 railway ties straight up a crater — the most brutal 1.6-mile workout on the island.
parking: Free parking at Koko Head District Park
hours: Open 24 hours (no gates; parking lot at Koko Head District Park always accessible)
bestTime: Pre-dawn start (bring headlamp) — avoid midday heat at all costs
insiderTips: Bring a headlamp if starting before dawn — many locals do this as a sunrise workout. The bridge section near the top has a bypass trail to the left if you're not comfortable crossing the gap. Very exposed with zero shade — bring plenty of water. There's a small botanical garden in the crater at the top.
